vita: As a representative for the Syl'Nar species in interstellar affairs, I have mediated numerous treaties between warring factions across star systems. My journey began on my home planet Slyloth where diplomacy is as natural to us as breathing air.
portrait_prompt: An emissary of peace with a translucent skin that shimmers like the iridescent hues of our native flora, standing in front of an ancient tree carved from living crystal on my home planet's sacred ground. Crystalline leaves form intricate patterns around me as I prepare for another diplomatic mission.
